snippet.title: Thodi Der -Full Video | Half Girlfriend | Arjun Kapoor & Shraddha Kapoor | Farhan S & Shreya Ghoshal
snippet.description:
Song - Thodi Der
Movie - Half Girlfriend
Singers - Farhan Saeed & Shreya Ghoshal
Music - Farhan Saeed
Lyricist - Kumaar

Music Arranged And Programmed By Dj Phukan
Asst. Madhab Deka
Co-Arranged & Keyboards By Ali Mustafa
Acoustic And Electric Guitar By Ankur Mukherjee
Harmonium By Aditya Oke
Sarangi By Murad Ali Khan

Vocals Recorded At Phatbox, (Mumbai)
Recording Engineer's - Pankaj Borah & Bhaskar Sarma
Song Mixed & Mastered By Eric Pillai (Future Sound Of Bombay)
Asst Mixing Engineers Michael Edwin Pillai & Lucky

Cast - Arjun Kapoor & Shraddha Kapoor
Production House - Balaji Motion Pictures
Producer - Shobha Kapoor, Ekta Kapoor, Mohit Suri & Chetan Bhagat
Director - Mohit Suri
Welcome to Soulful Shreya Ghoshal Songs, your melodious corner dedicated to the timeless voice of Shreya Ghoshal — one of India’s most celebrated playback singers. ✨🎤
Here, we bring you a heartfelt collection of her biggest hits, romantic melodies, and soul‑touching songs that have captured millions of hearts across the world.

snippet.title: Toxic Official Hindi Teaser | Rocking Star Yash | Geetu Mohandas | KVN | Monster Mind Creations
snippet.description:
It’s Gonna Get Crazyyyy !!!

Toxic - A Fairy Tale for Grown-Ups in cinemas worldwide on 19-03-2026 in Kannada, Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Malayalam and English

#ToxicTheMovie #Toxic #ToxicTeaser
#DaddyIsHome #ToxicTheMovie 

CAST: Yash, Kiara Advani, Nayanthara, Huma Qureshi, Tara Sutaria and Rukmini Vasanth
 
CREW:
Director of Photography: Rajeev Ravi
Music: Ravi Basrur
Production Designer: T. P. Abid
Editor: Ujwal Kulkarni
Sound Designer: Kunal Sharma
Associate Producers: Sandeep Sadashiva, Prashant Dileep Hardikar
Action Directors: J. J. Perry, Anbariv, Kecha Khamphakdee, Amrit Singh
Art Director (Bengaluru): Mohan B. Kere

Executive Producer: M. K. Subramanya
Kannada Dialogues: Raaghav Vinay
Directors of Choreography: Ganesh Acharya, Imran Sardhariya, A. Harsha
First Assistant Director: Rao Suhaib Khan

Line Producer: Akshay Mavle
Costume Designers: Neha R. Bajaj, Saniya Sardhariya (Yash)
Hair Designer: Darshan Yewalekar
Make-up & Prosthetics: Shipra Singh Acharya
Post Production: The Post Co.
Re-recording Mixer: Sreejesh Nair
Music Producer: Ravi Basrur, Chethan Handattu, Pavan Basrur, Jagadish Venky
RBM Composing Team: Santhosh Venky, Airaa Udupi, Rohit Siddappa 
Trumpet Live: Manju Bajanthri Devara Hosapete & Team
RBM Studio Coordinators:
Shivakumar, Nagaprakash Kota, Prakash Kumar, Krishna Basrur, Vijay Basrur
DI Colorist: Jayadev Tiruveaipati
DI: Redefine
VFX: DNEG
Publicity Design: Kabilan Chelliah
Visual Promotion: Ruben Trailer House

Written by: Yash & Geetu Mohandas
Directed by: Geetu Mohandas
Produced by: KVN Productions and Monster Mind Creations

snippet.title: BLACKPINK - ‘GO’ M/V
snippet.description:
BLACKPINK - GO

I’m on a mission
I’m in control
I want your body
I want your soul

Here to the rescue
I’m number one
Your guardian angel
Your kingdom come

March to the beat of
Beat of my drum
‘Cause when I call you 
You’re gonna come

Hold in position
It’s gonna blow
You only move when
When I say so

GO
Blackpink’ll make ya
GO
Blackpink’ll make ya
 
Go get it, Imma go get it
Never gonna settle for second
I need a gold medal
Get up on the floor, tell me when to go, 
no slow jams
Bumpin through the speakers when I do my
go go dance
 
Oh no, 
I go when I wanna I go, I'm so gone 
Go reckless, go off, like what could go wrong 
I'm goin all in, you should know that's my go-to
My whole crew with me, if I go then they go too

March to the beat of
Beat of my drum‘Cause when I call you 
You’re gonna come

Hold in position
It’s gonna blow
You only move when
When I say so

GO
Blackpink’ll make ya
GO
Blackpink’ll make ya

When your heart is broken baby
Darkness on the edge of town
Try to keep it open baby
Try to let your walls come down
 
I know you’re frozen baby
Love can make you turn to stone
You could stop and be alone
 
Or you could 

GO
Blackpink’ll make ya
GO

I’m on a mission
Mission misson mission 

Available @ http://orcd.co/blackpink-deadline

http://www.facebook.com/BLACKPINKOFFICIAL
http://www.youtube.com/BLACKPINKOFFICIAL
https://www.instagram.com/BLACKPINKOFFICIAL

snippet.title: BTS THE COMEBACK LIVE | ARIRANG | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
ARMY - ARE YOU READY?! Let the countdown begin, pop royalty is back!

BTS members RM, Jin, SUGA, j-hope, Jimin, V and Jung Kook reunite on the global stage for the first time to celebrate the release of their new album, Arirang. Catch the historic performance LIVE worldwide from Korea, only on Netflix.

BTS THE COMEBACK LIVE | ARIRANG. March 21 8PM KST / 7AM ET / 4AM PT.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/82157128

snippet.title: Balam Pichkari 8K Full Video | Yeh Jawaani Hai Deewani | Pritam | Ranbir,Deepika |Non Stop Holi Song
snippet.description:
Presenting the 8K Full Video Holi Song "Balam Pichkari" from the film "Yeh Jawaani Hai Deewani". Starring Ranbir Kapoor, Deepika Padukone, Aditya Roy Kapur & Kalki Koechlin.

Credits:
Song: Balam Pichkari
Music: Pritam Chakraborty
Singer: Vishal Dadlani, Shalmali Kholgade 
Lyrics: Amitabh Bhattacharya
Movie: Yeh Jawaani Hai Deewani (2013)
Director: Ayan Mukerji
Cast: Ranbir Kapoor, Deepika Padukone, Aditya Roy Kapoor, Kalki Koechlin
Music Label: T-Series

Lyrics:
Balam pichkari jo tune mujhe maari
Toh bole re zamana kharabi ho gayi
Mere ang raja, jo tera rang laga
Toh seedhi-saadi chhori sharabi ho gayi

Itna maza, kyun aa raha hai
Tune hawa mein bhaang milaya

Itna maza, kyun aa raha hai
Tune hawa mein bhaang milaya
Dugna nasha, kyun ho raha hai
Aankhon se meetha tune khilaya

Ho teri malmal ki kurti gulabi ho gayi
Manchali chaal kaise nawaabi ho gayi, toh?

Balam pichkari jo tune mujhe maari
Toh seedhi saadi chhori sharaabi ho gayi
Haa Jeans pahen ke jo tune maara thumka
Toh lattoo padosan ki bhabhi ho gayi (x2)

Teri kalaai hai, haathon mein aayi hai
Maine maroda toh lagti malaai hai

Mehenga padega ye chaska malaai ka
Upvaas karne mein teri bhalaai hai

Ho bindiya teri mehtaabi ho gayi
Dil ke armaanon mein behisaabi ho gayi

Balam pichkari jo tune mujhe maari
Toh seedhi saadi chhori sharaabi ho gayi
Haa Jeans pahen ke jo tune maara thumka
Toh lattoo padosan ki bhabhi ho gayi (x2)

Kyun ‘no-vacancy’ ki, hothon pe gaali hai
Jabki tere dil ka kamra toh khaali hai
(kamra toh khaali hai…)

Mujhko pata hai re
Kya chahata hai tu
Boli bhajan teri
Neeyat Qawwali hai

Zulmi ye haazir-jawaabi ho gayi
Tu toh har taale ki aaj chaabi ho gayi, toh?

Balam pichkari jo tune mujhe maari
Toh seedhi saadi chhori sharaabi ho gayi
Haa, Jeans pahen ke jo tune maara thumka
Toh lattoo padosan ki bhabhi ho gayi (x2)

Haan, bole re zamana kharabi ho gayi
Haan, bole re zamana kharabi ho gayi…

en-US.title: Balam Pichkari 8K Full Video | Yeh Jawaani Hai Deewani | Pritam | Ranbir,Deepika |Non Stop Holi Song
en-US.description:
Presenting the 8K Full Video Holi Song "Balam Pichkari" from the film "Yeh Jawaani Hai Deewani". Starring Ranbir Kapoor, Deepika Padukone, Aditya Roy Kapur & Kalki Koechlin.

Credits:
Song: Balam Pichkari
Music: Pritam Chakraborty
Singer: Vishal Dadlani, Shalmali Kholgade
Lyrics: Amitabh Bhattacharya
Movie: Yeh Jawaani Hai Deewani (2013)
Director: Ayan Mukerji
Cast: Ranbir Kapoor, Deepika Padukone, Aditya Roy Kapoor, Kalki Koechlin
Music Label: T-Series

Lyrics:
The Balam Pichkari tune that killed me
You said the world has become barren
My king, when your color touched me
The simple and simple girl has become drunk

Why are you having so much fun?
Tune: I mixed cannabis in the air

Why are you having so much fun?
Tune: I mixed cannabis in the air

Why are you getting double the intoxication? Yes,
I played a sweet tune with my eyes.

Yes, your muslin kurti has turned pink.

How did your playful gait become royal, then?

When my lover sprayed water on me, I killed him.
The simple, simple girl became a drunkard.
Yes, when I was wearing jeans, I slapped him.
The slut became my neighbor's sister-in-law (x2)

Your wrist is in my hands.
I mean, it feels like a mala.

This addiction to mala will be expensive.
It's your goodness to abstain.

Your bindi has become your beauty.
It has become immeasurable in the desires of my heart.

When my lover sprayed water on me, I killed him.
The simple, simple girl became a drunkard.
Yes, when I was wearing jeans, I slapped him.
The slut became my neighbor's sister-in-law. (x2)

Why are you cursing about 'no vacancy'?
When the room in your heart is empty.
(The room is empty...)

I know what you want.
You said your prayers.
Your intention is Qawwali.

O cruel one, you've become quick to reply.
You've become the key to every lock today, right?

The tune of "Balam Pichkari" killed me.
The simple, sari-clad girl became a drunkard.
Yes, the tune that struck me while I was wearing jeans,
Then I became the neighbor's sister-in-law (x2)

Yes, I said, the world has become barren.
Yes, I said, the world has become barren...

snippet.title: VEK X @swar5729 - SWAR | Prod by Pozod
snippet.description:
Final stop. Final energy. Final chapter of a journey we’ll never forget.
ClassX Rush Live Final EP

Vek ✖️ Swar — two voices, one stage, one powerful moment.
This is not just a live session, this is the closing of a story built with passion, pressure, practice, and pure love for music.

From the first beat to the last note, this final episode carries everything we believe in  raw performance, real emotion, and real connection with the crowd.
No filters. No shortcuts. Just music, movement, and memories made on stage.

Thank you to everyone who supported the journey, watched every episode, shared the clips, and believed in what we are building.
This one is for the culture.
This one is for the grind.
This one is for the people who never stopped listening.

PROD mix master : Pozod
KEYS : santosh tamang
Written & Composed : Swapnil Sharma
Shot by : ZAY & Acies ( Aurora production )

ClassX RUSH Live – Final EP
Vek ✖️ Swar  one stage, one moment, one memory.

© 2026 ClassX Presentation

snippet.title: Aspirants Season 3 - Official Trailer | Prime Video India
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Aspirants Season 3 Official Trailer 
Starring Naveen Kasturia, Sunny Hinduja, Jatin Goswami, Abhilash Thapliyal, Shivankit Singh Parihar, Namita Dubey, Tengam Celine
Directed by Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish
The Viral Fever Production

Official Release Date - March 13, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Inquiry begins on DM Abhilash after ALC Sandeep Ohlan’s allegations putting his personal relationship with Deepa, Guri, Dhairya, SK & Sandeep at stake and disrupting his professional goals against a new rival. While the young Abhilash, after having qualified for IRS, decides to attempt for IAS one final time preparing from Mukherjee Nagar among some new friends & foes.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

#aspirants #AspirantsOnPrime #trailer #officialtrailer #webseries #primevideoindia

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

#aspirants #AspirantsOnPrime #trailer #officialtrailer #webseries #primevideoindia

snippet.title: Ko Cha Ra (Official Music Video)
snippet.description: This music video is dedicated to every mother who put her own dreams aside so her children and family could have a better future. It’s a small tribute to the quiet strength, unconditional love, and countless sacrifices that often go unseen. To every mother who chose her family over her own dreams — thank you. We see you, we honor you, and we love you.

snippet.title: Navjot Ahuja - Khat (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Navjot Ahuja - Khat 
Stream/Download:

~ MUSIC INFO ~ 
Recorded by Solo, Jay
Mixed, Mastered by Mukul Jain (Ferris Wheel Studios)
Instagram - @ferriswheelstudios
Composition, Lyrics, Vocals - Navjot Ahuja 
Drums - Samarth Verma 
Guitars - Mehul Sharma 
Keys - Kanishk Diwakar
Bass Guitars- Himanshu

 ~Lyrics ~ Navjot Ahuja - Khat
Kaagaz ke phool laau tere liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye

Tere liye ghar banaau
Deewaarein neele rang se sajaau
Pasand hai tumhe, maloom hai
Tumne bataya tha ek dafe

Neele phool laau tere liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye

Teri baatein nasamajh si phir bhi jaayaz lag rahi hai
Tu pareshan kar rahi hai phir bhi masoom lag rahi hai
Tere liye mandir jaaun
Tere naam ka dia jalaaun
Hasta rahe tu chaahe jo ho
Tеri hasi ko nazar na lage

Kaagaz ke phool laau terе liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye…

Tere liye hum bane hai
Tere liye badal rahe hai
Kya mohabbat ho gayi hai
Teri hi teri baatein kare
Tere liye ghar banaau
Deewaarein neele rang se sajaau
Pasand hai tumhe, maloom hai
Tumne bataya tha ek dafe

Dekh shayar bana tere liye
Nagma likha tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu kyun
Tu khuda mere liye

it.title: Ho smesso...
it.description:
Ho smesso...

I frutti di fine Blox...!?

Okey, quindi ascolta, non cliccare su nessun link del profilo Roblox, se lo clicchi, succederà anche a te.
Ho provato a cambiare la mia password ma il codice non è mai arrivato. Dopo 1-5 minuti è arrivato 1 codice, ma quando l'ho inserito mi ha detto "codice sbagliato", forse ho cliccato 7 volte e ho reinviato il codice + nel video ho detto per sbaglio che dopo 2-3 ore ho cambiato password, cioè il codice non funzionava. Dopo 6-8 ore è arrivato 1 codice, funzionava, ho cambiato password + dopo averlo cambiato il codice non è mai arrivato, poi dopo 2-3 giorni e dopo 3 giorni di notte ho provato a chiedere il codice ed è arrivato in 1 minuto e l'ho cambiato + un po' difficile da spiegare in inglese + per fortuna ora è andato tutto bene + oggi ho cambiato il mio 2security in auther!

+ Unisciti al mio Discord qui: https://discord.gg/wmqUbMzQRZ

#bloxfruits #roblox

hi.title: मैं छोड़ता हूं...
hi.description:
मैंने छोड़ दिया...

ब्लॉक्स फ्रूट्स का अंत...!?

ठीक है, तो सुनो, किसी भी रोब्लॉक्स प्रोफाइल लिंक पर क्लिक मत करना। अगर तुमने क्लिक किया तो तुम्हारे साथ भी यही होगा।
मैंने अपना पासवर्ड बदलने की कोशिश की, लेकिन कोड 1-5 मिनट में ही आ गया। 45 मिनट बाद एक कोड आया, लेकिन मैंने उसे डाला तो 'गलत कोड' दिखा रहा था। शायद मैंने 'कोड दोबारा भेजें' पर 7 बार क्लिक किया। वीडियो में गलती से मैंने कह दिया कि पासवर्ड बदले हुए 2-3 घंटे हो गए हैं, मतलब वो कोड काम नहीं कर रहा था। 6-8 घंटे बाद एक कोड आया, वो काम कर गया। मैंने पासवर्ड बदल दिया। पासवर्ड बदलने के बाद भी एक दिन तक कोड नहीं आया। फिर 2-3 दिन और फिर 3 दिन बाद। रात में मैंने कोड मांगा तो 1 मिनट में आ गया और मैंने पासवर्ड बदल दिया। अंग्रेजी में थोड़ा समझाना मुश्किल है। शुक्र है कि अब सब ठीक चल रहा है। आज मैंने अपनी सुरक्षा सेटिंग बदलकर ऑथर कर दी है!

मेरे Discord से जुड़ें: https://discord.gg/wmqUbMzQRZ

#bloxfruits #roblox

pt-BR.title: Eu desisto...
pt-BR.description:
Desisto...

O fim do Blox Fruits...!?

Ok, então escutem, não cliquem em nenhum link de perfil do Roblox. Se clicarem, isso vai acontecer com vocês também.
Eu tentei mudar minha senha, mas o código nunca chegou. Depois de 1 a 5 minutos, chegou um código, mas quando o inseri, apareceu como código incorreto. Talvez eu tenha clicado em "reenviar código" umas 7 vezes. Além disso, no vídeo, eu disse sem querer que levei de 2 a 3 horas para mudar a senha, mas na verdade o código não funcionou. Depois de 6 a 8 horas, chegou um código que funcionou e eu mudei a senha. Depois de mudar a senha, o código não chegou por um dia, depois de 2 a 3 dias e, finalmente, depois de 3 dias à noite, tentei pedir o código e ele chegou em 1 minuto e eu o mudei. (É um pouco difícil explicar em inglês.) Felizmente, tudo deu certo agora. Hoje, mudei meu 2Security para Auther!

+ Entre no meu Discord aqui: https://discord.gg/wmqUbMzQRZ

#bloxfruits #roblox

id.title: Saya berhenti...
id.description:
Aku Menyerah...

Akhirnya Blox Fruits..!?

Oke, jadi dengarkan, jangan klik tautan profil Roblox apa pun. Jika kamu mengkliknya, ini akan terjadi padamu juga.
Aku mencoba mengubah kata sandiku, tetapi kodenya tidak pernah datang. 1-5 menit kemudian, 45 menit kemudian datang 1 kode, tetapi aku memasukkan kode tersebut dan muncul pesan kode salah. Mungkin aku mengklik kirim ulang kode 7 kali. + Dalam video, aku tidak sengaja mengatakan 2-3 jam setelah aku mengubah kata sandi. Maksudku, kodenya tidak berfungsi. Kemudian 6-8 jam setelah 6-8 jam, datang 1 kode, kode itu berfungsi. Aku mengubah kata sandi. + Setelah selesai, kodenya tidak pernah datang selama 1 hari, kemudian 2-3 hari, dan kemudian 3 hari di malam hari aku mencoba meminta kode dan kode itu datang dalam 1 menit dan aku mengubahnya. + Agak sulit dijelaskan dalam bahasa Inggris. + Untungnya, semuanya berjalan baik sekarang. + Hari ini aku mengubah keamananku menjadi Author!

+ Gabung Discord Saya di Sini: https://discord.gg/wmqUbMzQRZ

#bloxfruits #roblox

fr-FR.title: J'ai arrêté...
fr-FR.description:
J'ai arrêté...

La fin de Blox Fruits...!?

Écoutez bien : ne cliquez sur aucun lien de profil Roblox. Si vous le faites, ça vous arrivera aussi.

J'ai essayé de changer mon mot de passe, mais le code n'arrivait jamais. Au bout de 1 à 5 minutes, j'ai reçu un code, mais il était incorrect. J'ai dû cliquer 7 fois sur « Renvoyer le code ». Dans la vidéo, je dis par erreur que j'ai changé de mot de passe 2 à 3 heures plus tard, mais le code ne fonctionnait pas. Après 6 à 8 heures d'attente, j'ai reçu un code valide, j'ai changé mon mot de passe, puis je n'ai plus reçu de code pendant 1 jour, puis 2 ou 3 jours, et enfin 3 jours plus tard, la nuit, j'ai essayé de le redemander et il est arrivé en 1 minute. Je l'ai changé. C'est un peu difficile à expliquer en anglais. Heureusement, tout est rentré dans l'ordre maintenant. Aujourd'hui, j'ai changé mon deuxième mot de passe de sécurité en « Auteur » !

Rejoignez mon serveur Discord ici : https://discord.gg/wmqUbMzQRZ

#bloxfruits #roblox

es-US.title: Lo dejo...
es-US.description:
Renuncio...

¡Fin de las frutas Blox!?

Bueno, escucha, no hagas clic en ningún enlace de perfil de Roblox. Si lo haces, esto también te pasará.
Intenté cambiar mi contraseña, pero el código nunca llegó. Entre 1 y 5 minutos después, 45 minutos después, apareció un código, pero lo introduje y decía que era incorrecto. Quizás hice clic 7 veces para reenviar el código. En el video, accidentalmente, a las 2 o 3 horas, cambié la contraseña. O sea, el código no funcionaba. Entre 6 y 8 horas después, apareció un código que funcionaba. Cambié la contraseña. Después de cambiarlo, el código nunca llegó. Un día, dos o tres días después y tres días después, por la noche, intenté pedir el código y llegó en un minuto. Lo cambié. Fue difícil explicarlo en inglés. Por suerte, todo salió bien. ¡Hoy cambié mi contraseña de seguridad a la de autor!

+ Únete a mi Discord aquí: https://discord.gg/wmqUbMzQRZ

#bloxfruits #roblox

de-DE.title: Ich gebe auf...
de-DE.description:
Ich höre auf...

Das Ende von Roblox Fruits...!?

Okay, also hört zu: Klickt bloß nicht auf Roblox-Profillinks! Wenn ihr das tut, passiert euch das auch. Ich habe versucht, mein Passwort zu ändern, aber der Code kam erst nach 1-5 Minuten. Nach 45 Minuten kam dann ein Code, aber als ich ihn eingegeben habe, hieß es, er sei falsch. Ich habe dann bestimmt sieben Mal auf „Code erneut senden“ geklickt. Im Video habe ich versehentlich gesagt, dass ich das Passwort vor 2-3 Stunden geändert habe. Ich meine, der Code hat nicht funktioniert. Nach 6-8 Stunden kam dann endlich ein Code, der funktioniert hat. Ich habe mein Passwort geändert. Nachdem ich das getan hatte, kam der Code einen Tag lang nicht, dann wieder 2-3 Tage und schließlich, drei Tage später, nachts habe ich versucht, einen Code anzufordern. Er kam innerhalb einer Minute und ich habe ihn geändert. Schwer zu erklären auf Englisch. Zum Glück ist jetzt alles gut gegangen. Heute habe ich meine Zwei-Faktor-Authentifizierung auf Autorisierung umgestellt!

Tritt meinem Discord-Server hier bei: https://discord.gg/wmqUbMzQRZ

#bloxfruits #roblox

Bass:- Ernest Tibbs
Duff:- Iqbal Azad
Harmonium:- Feroz Shaikh
Acoustic Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily and Arijit Singh
Electric Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily 

Lyrics:
Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Tadpana O Zaalima, O Zaalima
Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Behkana O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Aankhen Marhaba, Baatein Marhaba
Main Sau Martaba Deewana Huaa
Mera Na Raha Jab Se Dil Mera
Tere Husn Ka Nishana Hua

Jiski Har Dhadkan Tu Ho
Aise Dil Ko Kya Dhadkana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Saanson Mein Teri Nazdeeqiyon Ka
Itrr Tu Ghol De, Ghol De…
Main Hi Kyun Ishq Zaahir Karun
Tu Bhi Kabhi Bol De, Bol De…

Leke Jaan Hi Jaayega Meri
Qaatil Har Tera Bahaana Hua
Tujhse Hi Shuru
Tujhpe Hi Khatam
Mere Pyaar Ka Fasaana Hua

Tu Shamma Hai Toh Yaad Rakhna
Main Bhi Hoon Parwaana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima..

Deedaar Tera Milne Ke Baad Hi
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tu Hi Bata De Kyun Zaalima Main Kehlayi..

snippet.description:

Raghu Dronavalli , Vallibaba Akula,  Juvvaala Kartheek (Tinku) , Vinay Kollu

Operative Cinematographer - Ram Kumar.R
Associate Cinematographer - Dwarakesh.S, Aboorvan.A
Assistant Cinematographer - Melvin
Brand Agency Partner - MMM Media Works 

Lyrics:
PALLAVI
Hey nee ayya jagiraa
Chal maavaadochindra
Iga jadthiyyaley | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Hey aa daar kaa sulthaane
Maa ghar kaa saithaane
Chal shikaar jeyya | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Pacha bottu gaayamidhi | Aaya sher |
Gunjukuney nyayamidhi | Aaya sher |
Boodidhala gadda idhi | Aaya sher |
Maatho raayabadda kadhe idhi | Aaya sher |

Jadaluro jadaluro hadaluro dhadaluro
Kodutharo thodaluro theestharo tholuro
Savaariki doruku biddaa
Sevaaley lesthayi biddaa

Pegul dheesi medala yesi
Aadutham biddaa, aadutham biddaa

CHARANAM

Aada eeda yeda joodu biddaa
Vanukay puttalinka paditheynay naa needa
Bondha pedutha maliknaina gooda
Vaani saavu raasukochina devuni kaada

Chal udukuthundhi saraa battilo maa kanta thade
| Jumbalikay aaya aaya sher |

Iga raaluthadhi bottu bottulo nee panche thade
| Jumbalikay aaya aaya sher |

Jadaluro jadaluro hadaluro dhadaluro
Kodutharo thodaluro theestharo tholuro
Savaariki doruku biddaa
Sevaaley lesthayi biddaa

Pegul dheesi medala yesi
Aadutham biddaa, aadutham biddaa

SECOND PALLAVI

Hey bari batthalunonninraa
Bar baadhey ayinonraa
Nannu peekuthava | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Hey moldhaaram lenoniraa
Nee kanaa mondonraa
Iga peekuthava | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Pottu pottu aakalundhi | Aaya sher |
Mettu mettu ekkuthara | Aaya sher |
Peru pathaa leynonni raa | Aaya sher |
Choosko Paradise ku addresaitha | Aaya sher |

Pottu pottu aakalundhi
Mettu mettu ekkuthara
Peru pathaa leynonni raa
Choosko Paradise ku addresaitha

Hey nee ayya jagiraa

Iga jadthiyyaley | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Maa ghar kaa saithaane
Chal shikaar jeyya | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Pacha bottu gaayamidhi | Aaya sher |
Gunjukuney nyayamidhi | Aaya sher |
Boodidhala gadda idhi | Aaya sher |
Maatho raayabadda kadhe idhi | Aaya sher |

Jadaluro jadaluro hadaluro dhadaluro
Kodutharo thodaluro theestharo tholuro
Savaariki doruku biddaa
Sevaaley lesthayi biddaa

Pegul dheesi medala yesi
Aadutham biddaa, aadutham biddaa

CHARANAM

Aada eeda yeda joodu biddaa
Vanukay puttalinka paditheynay naa needa
Bondha pedutha maliknaina gooda
Vaani saavu raasukochina devuni kaada

Chal udukuthundhi saraa battilo maa kanta thade
| Jumbalikay aaya aaya sher |

Iga raaluthadhi bottu bottulo nee panche thade
| Jumbalikay aaya aaya sher |

Kodutharo thodaluro theestharo tholuro

Nannu peekuthava | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Pariwartan is a song about hope, dreams and a transformation we've all been waiting for and so deserve. 

Written & performed by Samriddhi Rai 
Music mix and production - Manzil Bikram KC 

Cinematographers - Prashant Mahat, Vikas Ranzitkar, Bibek Magar

Video Production by Fuzzy Films

snippet.title: Maan Panu - The Last Letter (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
‘The Last Letter’ is about the words we never said, and the love that never really leaves. This is for anyone who has ever held on to that one last feeling… that one last memory… that one last letter.

STREAM NOW: https://va.lnk.to/thelastletter

snippet.title: JAMESY - NACHANA ft VZN & Hennie Baker (Prod @YogeshBeats)
snippet.description:
“Nachana” is a high-energy Nepali track inspired by the infectious grooves of Brazilian funk, blended with our own desi flavor. 💃🏽🕺🏽
This song is all about movement, confidence, and letting the rhythm take over—when the beat drops, timi NACHANA.

From heavy bass to catchy hooks, “Nachana” brings global sounds together with a Nepali soul. Turn up the volume, feel the groove, and dance like nobody’s watching.

🎧 Listen. Feel. Nacha

Written and Performed by 

JAMESY
https://www.instagram.com/jamesyboy.dg/

VZN

Hennie Baker

localized.description:
“Nachana” is a high-energy Nepali track inspired by the infectious grooves of Brazilian funk, blended with our own desi flavor. 💃🏽🕺🏽
This song is all about movement, confidence, and letting the rhythm take over—when the beat drops, timi NACHANA.

From heavy bass to catchy hooks, “Nachana” brings global sounds together with a Nepali soul. Turn up the volume, feel the groove, and dance like nobody’s watching.

🎧 Listen. Feel. Nacha

snippet.title: Yabesh Thapa - Muskuraye | Live From EDN Sanepa | GhaamChhaya Intimate
snippet.description:
Hi lovelies,
Back in December, we did a very intimate show — just a few people, a lot of emotion, and the music that means everything to us. We filmed the night, and this is me and the band performing Muskuraye live at GhaamChhaya Intimate.

We’ll be sharing more moments from that evening soon. Until then, stream the album 'GhaamChhaya' on all major platforms.
And happy Valentine’s Day ;)

Keys / Vocals — Yabesh Thapa
Female BV — Oshin Karki
Male BV / AC Guitar — John Tamang
Drums — Stifler
Bass — Av Kc
Electric Guitar — Roshan Lama
Sarangi — Kiran Maharjan
Flute — Shrijan Maharjan
Audio Engineer — Neerab Shrestha

Mixed / Master — Kobid Bazra

Special thanks to Ruslan Studio and Jade Studio for supporting us.

Stay connected:
https://www.instagram.com/yabush69/

#ghaamchhaya

© 2026 ClassX Presentation

snippet.title: 🤔aaj kunali or piyush Milne aaye 😱 Indian theft aura simulator ||Indian bike 3d
snippet.description:
🤔aaj kunali or piyush Milne aaye 😱 Indian theft aura simulator ||Indian bike 3d


What happens when the worlds of gaming, vlogging, and cartoons collide? In today’s action-packed episode of Indian Bikes Driving 3D, we are heading on a massive mission!
The Storyline:
We are traveling deep into the village to meet the legends themselves—Sourav Joshi, Piyush Joshi, and Kunal! But we aren't going empty-handed. To make this meeting unforgettable, we’ve secured a luxury Ferrari as a special gift!
The Squad:
It’s not just a solo trip! We’ve got the ultimate gang traveling together by train:
Chacha (The muscle)
Doraemon (With his gadgets ready)
Shinchan (Bringing the mischief)
Watch us navigate the tracks, manage the heavy cargo on the train, and drive through the village roads to deliver this supercar to the Joshi family. Will we reach safely, or will there be chaos on the way?
Buckle up for the most legendary delivery in simulator history!

The Mission: Delivering a Ferrari via train.
The Guests: Sourav Joshi, Piyush, and Kunal.
The Crew: Shinchan, Doraemon, and Chacha.
The Game: Indian Bikes Driving 3D (Indian Simulator).
#Hashtags:
#IndianBikesDriving3D #SouravJoshiVlogs #PiyushJoshiGaming #IndianSimulator #DoraemonInIndia #ShinchanFunnyMoments #FerrariGift #GamingCrossover #TrainMission #SouravJoshi #VillageVlog #IndianGamingCommunity

snippet.title: Desh Ko Maya Feat. Arthur Gunn - Neetesh Jung Kunwar
snippet.description:
Desh Ko Maya Feat. Arthur Gunn (Dibesh Pokhrel) - Neetesh Jung Kunwar

Listen to Desh Ko Maya on Spotify-

https://music.apple.com/np/album/desh-ko-maya-feat-arthur-gunn-single/1881699953

Lyrics

याद आए डाडा र पाखा
एक सांझै मन भारी हुन्छ
रसाएनि मेरा आँखा
जब देशको मायाले छुन्छ

हेर्छु म ठूलठूला महल
सीरानी एउटैले पुग्छ
मनैभरि चहल-पहल
जब देशको मायाले छुन्छ
जब देशको मायाले छुन्छ


याद आए खोला र नदी
जति टाढा आउछ त्यति बढी
जन्मेको भूमि आफ्नो हुन्छ
जब देशको मायाले छुन्छ
जब देशको मायाले छुन्छ

धुम्छु म ठूला-ठूला सहर
रम्छु देश विदेशमा
तर मेटिन्न कहिल्यै यो तिर्सना
जब देशको यादले छुन्छ
जब देशको मायाले छुन्छ
जब देशको मायाले छुन्छ

कहाँ गए होलान् ति दिन
आज सम्झी मन मेरो रुन्छ
भिडमै हराउॅंछु म किन
जब देशको मायाले छुन्छ

धुम्छु म ठूला-ठूला सहर
रम्छु देश विदेशमा
जन्मेको भूमि आफ्नो हुन्छ
जब देशको मायाले छुन्छ
जब देशको मायाले छुन्छ

जब देशको मायाले छुन्छ ।

snippet.title: TIMRO LOOKS - Rinmorin ft. KBABI (Official Music Video) Prod. itsriken
snippet.description:
TIMRO LOOKS - Rinmorin ft. KBABI (Official Music Video) Prod. Itsriken 
⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯
“TIMRO LOOKS” is a rap song with a flirty mood, talking about that one girl whose looks and vibe keep running through my mind♪

Official Audio - https://youtu.be/hMIDW5HUY08?si=OMalmwP6kpg-L5n5

lyrics...

HOOK *
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER
MERO HOOK TIMI SAMPLE 
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER 
ATOM BOOM VANDA DANGER 
                     X2

Rinmorin - Verse 
HEJO SAAMA MALAI BAAL THYNA 
KASAI KO YHA JABA TIMLAI DEKHY MERO 
MUKH BATA DAMM GRIL 

LUKI LUKI HERNY BANI LAGYO TIMI LAI 
MA NAJIKINA KHOJE TARA KADA UMRYO JHYAN VAARRR

HALKA GARIDAUNA BATH 
ABO CHAIYO TIMRO SAATH DIYE 
CHODINA YO HAAT JHUTO  BOLE 
VANY MARI JAAUU

MUTU VETRA JAMMA 4 WOTA THAU 
HUNXA 
2 THAUMA TIMI RA MAH  2 THAUMA 
AAMA BAAU

RAKHI SAKE TIMLAI AARU VANDA MATHI 
AAKHA LAUNY TORI HARKO HAAT KHUTAA
VAACHDINXU MAAA

AARU VANDA NIKAI FARK XU MAH BAAL SANGAI  BUDHI ANI BAAG JASTI AATI XU MAAH 
TIMI 
XAUMA HUDA KAILY AATIN XA MAANN
JHUTO BOLYA HOINA  NASALU CHJJJ KHADINA MA
JALMA
 PARISAKE KEBAL HAAT DINUU LAAAA
ABO BAKI KURA PANDIT LAI RAKHDINXU MA TIMRO 

 LACHKINY KAAMR KO 36 KO number 
NA LAJAUNA VANNA LAI BADDHAI CHA 
HUNGER MA JAPDAI  XU MANTAR YHA DHERI XA ANTAR 
TIMRO JAWANI DEKHE RA LAAGDAI CHA 
CHAKKR

MA MAYA KO ROGI 
TIMI BANDAUNA 
DOCTOR AHH
 MAYA KO LAGI KATI 
KHADAI CHU THAKKR

HALKA BADY KO JEEUDAL 
MAH  MAKHHA TIMI SIMPLE NAI 
RAMRI NA PARANA NAKAL 

HOOK *
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER
MERO HOOK TIMI SAMPLE 
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER 
ATOM BOOM VANDA DANGER
                  X2

KBABI - verse 
NAHANA KTA GUFF MATHI GUFF 
DHERAI AATE GAYE TIMI JASTO CHAKS
RAYAAK LAGI RACHA PACHI PACHI
NAPARANA HASSss…..

Rinmorin - YOU KNOW WHAT I MEAN !!!

FASDINA MAH JHAL MAH
NAGARANA AASH 
JAY HO TYI VANDINXU MALAI LAGDAINA K LAAJ
MALAI MAAN PARDAINA BOKA HARU 
VANU PARDA KHASS
SAMALYRA RAKHA TIMRO JAWANI KO MAAT

K VAKO KTA HARU KT DEKHI MARNY
JHYAP CHA SIDE MAH CHICKS KO PAXI PARNY KT DEKHNAI HUNNA 
MASKY RA KURA GARNY 
K BOLIDI HALYO VANY FERI
MASKI NAJIK SARNY 

GARO GARO VAKO HOLA 
JAWANI DEKHYRA
CHITTA BUJAU ABO KTA 
TADHAI BATA HERYRA
TIMI JASTO GAFADI YHA KTA HARU
DHERAI CHA THMANAI NASAKNY TESTO KURA MA MAH K RAICHA 

Rinmorin - OH shit !!

KBABI - MAYA KO ROGI VAYE JAAU GARAU CHECK UP 
TIMRO POCKET MONEY LAY AAUDAINA MERO MAKE-UP
SOCHDAI SOCHDINA MA MERO MIND PURAI SETUP 
KBABI TESTO KTA GARDAINA NI DESERVE 

PATAUNA KHOJYA HOLA
PATINY MAH CHAINA
GUFADI KO TRUST UMMM HMM
TESTO KT HOINA
KTA HARKO BANI SABI YESTI TA HO NI 
AAFNO KAAM GARA PACHI NALAGANA
SORRY BRO….

HOOK *
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER
MERO HOOK TIMI SAMPLE 
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER 
ATOM BOOM VANDA DANGER  
                  X2 


🎵 Listen on All Platforms:
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/album/1X8s9oJ5GfTy1fU3jGyFkZ?si=3w_4k112TnWm1i8Ul_33CA

Ghoom ghoom ghoomta hi rahu

snippet.title: Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe Official Video Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya #bollywood #hindisong #2026
snippet.description:
Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits Song 2026
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

snippet.title: The Chainsmokers, Halsey - Closer (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
The Chainsmokers, Halsey - Closer (Lyrics)

⭐Follow FireFly Nights:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/tianajovik/
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/01JM4YgYPeOlFaeIcU3Ntw?si=0c1741492d6f4eb7
🔴 Picture : https://lexica.art/ 

⭐The Chainsmokers:
Facebook: https://thechainsmokers.lnk.to/followFI
Instagram: https://thechainsmokers.lnk.to/followII
Twitter: https://thechainsmokers.lnk.to/followTI
Site: https://thechainsmokers.lnk.to/followWI
Spotify: https://thechainsmokers.lnk.to/followSI
Soundcloud: https://soundcloud.com/thechainsmokers
Youtube: https://thechainsmokers.lnk.to/subscribeYD
Tiktok: https://www.tiktok.com/@thechainsmokers
Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/us/artist/the-chainsmokers/580391756

⭐Halsey:
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/halsey


Lyrics:

[Verse 1: Andrew Taggart]
Hey, I was doing just fine before I met you
I drink too much and that's an issue, but I'm okay
Hey, you tell your friends it was nice to meet them
But I hope I never see them again

[Pre-Chorus: Andrew Taggart]
I know it breaks your heart
Moved to the city in a broke-down car
And four years, no calls
Now you're lookin' pretty in a hotel bar
And I-I-I can't stop
No, I-I-I can't stop

[Chorus: Andrew Taggart]
So, baby, pull me closer
In the backseat of your Rover
That I know you can't afford
Bite that tattoo on your shoulder
Pull the sheets right off the corner
Of the mattress that you stole
From your roommate back in Boulder
We ain't ever gettin' older

[Drop: Andrew Taggart]
We ain't ever gettin' older
We ain't ever gettin' older

[Verse 2: Halsey]
You look as good as the day I met you
I forget just why I left you, I was insane
Stay and play that blink-182 song
That we beat to death in Tucson, okay

[Pre-Chorus: Halsey, Halsey & Andrew Taggart]
I know it breaks your heart
Moved to the city in a broke-down car
And four years, no call
Now I'm lookin' pretty in a hotel bar
And I-I-I can't stop
No, I-I-I can't stop

[Chorus: Andrew Taggart & Halsey]
So, baby, pull me closer
In the backseat of your Rover
That I know you can't afford
Bite that tattoo on your shoulder
Pull the sheets right off the corner
Of the mattress that you stole
From your roommate back in Boulder
We ain't ever gettin' older

[Drop: Andrew Taggart & Halsey]
We ain't ever gettin' older
We ain't ever gettin' older

[Chorus: Andrew Taggart]
So, baby, pull me closer
In the backseat of your Rover
That I know you can't afford
Bite that tattoo on your shoulder
Pull the sheets right off the corner
Of the mattress that you stole
From your roommate back in Boulder
We ain't ever gettin' older

[Bridge: Andrew Taggart, Halsey, Andrew Taggart & Halsey]
We ain't ever gettin' older
No, we ain't ever gettin' older
We ain't ever gettin' older
No, we ain't ever gettin' older
We ain't ever gettin' older
We ain't ever gettin' older
We ain't ever gettin' older
No, we ain't ever gettin' older

[Drop: Halsey, Halsey & Andrew Taggart]
Older
We ain't ever gettin' older
Older
No, we ain't ever gettin' older

Female - 
Ghadi me baje 5 sham ke chore ka na pata thikana

system maare naam te haale

Gaadi lakh dallar ki niche duniya fan bna rakhi

Ghne handle kre ilaake yaar tera 
System phaad ke raakhe yaar tera 
Kyi bando ko hazam na hove 
Duniya peeche rakhe yaar tera 

desi chore gaama ke 
Zikar hai mehnge daama me 
Niche chahe g Wagon hai 
FAN HAI AAJ BHI YAMHA KE 

Seedhi seedhi bat h baby
Na kise cheez ki ghaat h baby
Jiske jyada khaaj lagri
Mere pas ilaaj h baby

Jaave mall trackter pe 
Chora kam na kisi bhi actor te Tere shehar m aave raosahab jab
Bawli Jaam lag ja h sector me

Meri Ammi dhunde var mere tayi
Saakh modti chali m
Tere yara ki bhabhi banna teri bnu
gharwali m
Na kisi bat ki fikr krenge maze sath
me zikar krenge
Tere sath hi jana chahti saiyan trip
pe bali m
Haath me rakh hath bawle pyar ki
kar 2 bat bawle
Pache na ho nyu...o balma
O balma ainak kali pehen ke lage

snippet.title: 100 Days as King of the Unstable SMP
snippet.description:
After becoming the first King of the Unstable SMP, I promised to protect my people and my kingdom... and if I don't? Then I'll resign. These are my First 100 Days as King of the Unstable SMP.  

Unstable SMP:
➜ ‪  ‪ @wemmbumc 
➜ ‪  ‪ @FlameFragsMC 
➜ ‪   @Spokeishere 
➜ ‪  ‪ @ParrotX2  

Like ParrotX2 and his Unstable SMP series, where he is escaping Paragon / Proton: Minecraft's Most Secure Prison, or got hunted by a Minecraft Player who doesn't exist. This is a new and original Minecraft idea like HermitCraft or Lifesteal with Wemmbu, FlameFrags, or Spoke. Survival is harder than Hardcore Minecraft because PVP is on.

People in this video: @TheobaldTheBird @fymada @HoraceMinecraft @dragon_mc_ @lezywezy @4CVIT @LettuceK 

Original Song by @tsynphonia 

This is a video on the Unstable Universe: a staged Minecraft server where ParrotX2, Wemmbu, Spoke, and FlameFrags tell stories in Minecraft.

A Minecraft video made by Parrot or ParrotX2 on other platforms! Enjoy!

snippet.title: Bruno Mars - Risk It All [Official Music Video]
snippet.description:
Bruno Mars - Risk It All

The Romantic – the new album from Bruno Mars, available now. Listen now: https://brunomars.lnk.to/TheRomantic

Directed by Bruno Mars & Daniel Ramos

Lyrics: 
For just a chance to win your heart
you could set the bar
beyond the stars
I’ll do anything anything you ask me to

Say you want the moon watch me learn to fly
Ain't a mountain you could point to i wouldn’t climb
It's crazy but it’s true. There’s nothing I won't do. 
I’d risk it all for you

To hold your hand and call you mine
I’m trynna be your man
til the end of time
oh i’ll do anything, anything you ask me to

I would run through the fire just to be by your side
if your heart’s on the line you could take mine
It's crazy but it’s true. There's nothing I won’t do. 
I'd risk it all for you

I would swim across the sea just to show you
sacrifice my life just to hold you
I could go on and on to prove that you belong
here in my arms

Say you want the moon watch me, learn to fly
ain’t a mountain you could point to I wouldn’t climb

It's crazy but it’s true. There's nothing I won’t do
I’d risk it all for you (2x)

Join Bruno’s mailing list: https://drop.cobrand.com/d/BrunoMars/Subscribe

Shop Bruno’s official store: https://brunomars.lnk.to/officialstore

Connect with Bruno: 
https://www.tiktok.com/@brunomars
https://www.instagram.com/brunomars
https://www.youtube.com/brunomars
https://x.com/brunomars
https://www.facebook.com/brunomars

https://brunomars.com

Bruno Mars is a 16x GRAMMY®-winning global superstar, singer, songwriter, multi-instrumentalist, producer, and one of the most-streamed artists in the world. Known for his showmanship and chart-toppers, Bruno has set a number of records throughout his career, including becoming the first artist ever to hit 150 million monthly listeners on Spotify, appearing on two of the fastest songs to reach one billion streams (for “Die with a Smile” with Lady Gaga and “APT.” with ROSÉ, and achieving the highest-certified song in RIAA history with 2010’s “Just the Way You Are”). Since launching a string of hits beginning in 2009, Bruno has sold over 150 million records worldwide, making him one of the best-selling artists of all time. Beyond his work as a soloist, Bruno is a member of the duo Silk Sonic with Anderson .Paak. In addition to his 35 Billboard Hot 100 hits, including nine number one singles, Bruno is the recipient of 16 GRAMMY® Awards (including “Album of the Year” for 24K Magic), 14 American Music Awards, and seven MTV Video Music Awards. His 24K Magic World Tour was among the highest-grossing tours in history, and within the top ten highest-grossing of the 2010s.

#BrunoMars #RiskItAll #OfficialMusicVideo

snippet.description:
Vrindavan Mein Ude Re Gulal - वृन्दावन में उड़े रे गुलाल कह दो राधा रानी से | Holi Bhajan

Album :- Vrindavan Mein Ude Re Gulal 
Song :- Vrindavan Mein Ude Re Gulal Keh Do Radha Rani Se
Singer :- Chetna
Lyrics :- Traditional
Music :- RRD
Lable :- Sunao Bhajan

radha krishna holi song,radha krishna bhajan,holi bhajan,vrindavan me ude re gulal,vrindavan mein ude re gulal,vrindavan mein ude re gulal keh do radha rani se,vrindavan me ude re gulal keh do radha rani se,vrindavan holi bhajan,vrindavan ki holi,holiya me ude re gulal bhajan,shyam holi geet,kanha ji holi bhajan,kanha ji holi song,radha krishna holi bhajan 2025,radha krishna holi bhajan,krishna songs,krishna bhajan,holi ke bhajan,holi bhajan krishna,bhajan 

वृन्दावन में उड़े रे गुलाल कह दो राधा रानी से,
कह दो राधा रानी से हाँ कह दो राधा रानी से….

राधा हमारी भोली भाली,
हाँ भोली भाली भोली भाली,
नटखट नन्द का लाल कह दो राधा रानी से,
वृन्दावन में उड़े रे गुलाल कह दो राधा रानी से…………

राधा हमारी गोरी गोरी,
गोरी गोरी राधा गोरी गोरी,
श्याम सलोने नन्द लाल कह दो राधा रानी से,
वृन्दावन में उड़े रे गुलाल कह दो राधा रानी से…………

राधा के माथे पे बिंदिया सोहे,
बिंदिया सोहे हाँ बिंदिया सोहे,
मोर मुकुट नन्द लाल कह दो राधा रानी से,
वृन्दावन में उड़े रे गुलाल कह दो राधा रानी से…………

राधा के हाथों में चुडिया सोहे,
चुडिया सोहे हाँ चुडिया सोहे,
बंसी बजावे नन्द लाल कह दो राधा रानी से,
वृन्दावन में उड़े रे गुलाल कह दो राधा रानी से…………

चन्द्रग्रहण के पावन समय में मंत्र जाप और भगवान Vishnu की आराधना का विशेष महत्व माना गया है।

“श्रीमन नारायण नारायण हरि हरि” मंत्र भगवान Vishnu का अत्यंत पवित्र और शक्तिशाली नाम-स्मरण मंत्र है। मान्यता है कि चन्द्रग्रहण के दौरान इस मंत्र का श्रवण करने से मन को शांति, सकारात्मक ऊर्जा और आध्यात्मिक बल प्राप्त होता है।

🙏 विशेष रूप से गर्भवती महिलाएं इस मंत्र को श्रद्धा से सुनें और सकारात्मक वातावरण बनाए रखें।

🔔 वीडियो को पूरा सुनें और अधिक से अधिक लोगों तक शेयर करें।
जय श्रीमन नारायण 🙏

snippet.title: Real Madrid vs Barcelona SQUAD BUILDER BATTLE — FC Mobile El Classico!
snippet.description:
🔥 Real Madrid vs Barcelona… the ultimate El Clásico Squad Builder Battle in FC Mobile! ⚔️

Today we’re building two of the biggest clubs in football history — Real Madrid and Barcelona — and putting them head-to-head in an insane squad builder showdown.

From ICON legends to current superstars, this El Clásico battle has everything:
* Who builds the higher OVR squad?
* Which team has the better attack?
* And who actually wins on the pitch?

This isn’t just nostalgia — this is a full FC Mobile war between two giants. 🤯

Watch till the end to see which side dominates El Clásico in FC Mobile.

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn
